text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Not too long ago, in a certain town, there lived a
completely ordinary Umamusume named
Machitan.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Machitan worked diligently as the face of her
family's very popular restaurant and was
well-loved by all the customers!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Sharing meals with everyone put a smile on her
face!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, that's not it. Seeing everyone's happy
faces as they ate their meals is what put a smile
on her face!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
These happy days continued on... until an
Umamusume race started playing on the
restaurant's TV!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
As the customers watched the race, their smiles
grew larger and larger! Machitan was no
exception—her heart started lubbing and dubbing
like crazy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And that was that! In an instant, Machitan fell in
love with the world of racing.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
She joined a club and began training. Then she
signed up for a tryout, and once she passed...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
She was accepted to Tracen Academy! Where she
lived happily ever after!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Wait, that's it?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yep, that's it! Pretty typical, huh? Even the way I
got interested in racing was really ordinary.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
The fact you were able to get into Tracen at all
makes it difficult to consider you particularly
ordinary.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
No kidding. This is one of the hardest schools to
get into in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is a day to remember—the day that
Matikanetannhauser and I begin our foray into
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've come to watch a scrimmage with some of
her friends...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The wild and energetic Twin Turbo, the slightly
cynical Nice Nature, and the highly intelligent
Ikuno Dictus.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: So it's finally time for your debut race, Machi.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. Excuse me, Ms. Matikanetannhauser!
Could you tell us about your goals as you embark
on the Twinkle Series?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Great question, Nature! I simply want to do my
very best!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I mean the races in the Twinkle Series are packed
with really strong runners.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's perfectly normal to not win graded races, and
only a small handful are able to win G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But some strive for even greater feats, like
becoming the Classic Triple Crown champion or
conquering the Twin Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Winning even a single G1 race is already a tall
order, yet they have to win several in a row!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You really have to wonder how they achieve such
glory.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I totally get what you mean!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But you know, that feeling's exactly what makes
me want to win.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You want to... win? I mean, I understand the feeling. I
get it, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm going where the competition is. I want to go
out there and win, nice and normal-like!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So to start off, I've decided to never give up and
aim for first place in every race!

text_block_list.name: Nature & Turbo
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I like the sound of that! Count me in!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You too?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hang on! How did you reach that conclusion from
everything you said before?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Look! I've even planned out my whole strategy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser pulls out a notebook and
shows it to Nice Nature.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you weren't lying! Even your meals are
planned out.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Pretty good, huh?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Geez. As always, I don't know if you just like to
dream big or if you just don't know any better...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, I'd say that's one of her better
qualities.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Not just anyone has the ability to chase after big
dreams like it's perfectly normal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, a huge cheer erupts from the stands, as
if to cut their conversation short.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
It's started! The race between Teio and McQueen
has started!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is at their starting gate... and the race
has begun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Teio and McQueen have burst to the front
by themselves! They're crazy fast!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
That's why all the stayers look up to McQueen!
Her very presence is on another level!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
You can really see why people are calling Teio
the star of the classic year. She really is a prodigy!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It's clear that the two of them are a cut above the
rest.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They've passed the 200-meter mark and are far
ahead of the other racers! It's basically a
one-on-one duel!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: This is where the real race begins! Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Not on my watch! Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: What an absolutely, positively incredible race!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
...Though, to be honest, it makes me glad that I
didn't bother entering.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
The other racers sure look grim. It's
understandable, though, considering how soundly
they were beaten.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the cheers for the two prodigies were
loud enough to sting the hearts of the "ordinary"
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wow! What an incredible race! Don't you think
so?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It really was unbelievable. A duel between two
phenomenal talents...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's like the other racers weren't even there! Gosh!
They were so incredible it gave me tingles!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I wonder... What would it take for an ordinary
runner like me to beat them? Maybe a direct
pursuit from the rear?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But Teio's acceleration is tremendous, so I'd need
to conserve enough stamina to deal with that...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I guess I should start by building up some
muscle.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...We just witnessed a sight that strikes fear into
the heart of most runners, or leaves them
dumbstruck or discouraged at the very least...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's not really something that gets people excited.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: O-oh. Really?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, really. Though... I could probably stand to
learn a thing or two from you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Anyway... I'm going back to campus.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Nature! Wait!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hey, did I say something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
On the contrary! Nice Nature's observation is
exceedingly apt! It's one of your greatest charms!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Director!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I happened to overhear you while I was taking a
stroll. Pure coincidence! Setting that aside...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
You should know that I'm expecting great things
from you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Y-y-y-you are?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Yes! It's because you're you that you have the
potential to guide many other Umamusume! I
implore you to give your races everything you've
got!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...And that's what she said! Ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This isn't the first time that Director Akikawa has
said something like that to Matikanetannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
You have a bright future! I'm very much looking
forward to watching your races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if she was speaking as the director of the
academy or as an individual who cares for
Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her true intentions remain unclear, but there's no
doubt she has her eye on Matikanetannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I really don't know why she has any
kind of hopes for me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh well, I'll think about it later! The fact that she
knew about my debut means she must be keeping
track of my progress!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm just happy to know she's taken notice of me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All right! That settles it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'll give the Twinkle Series a go!
choice_data_list: (So... not going all out I guess.)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You too, Trainer! Let's both put in a little effort!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ignoring the "a little effort" part, it does seem
that Director Akikawa's expectations have made
a big impression on Matikanetannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, my days pursuing victory with the
ordinary, slightly clumsy, yet hardworking
Matikanetannhauser begin.
